title: Scabiosa velenovskiana
taxonomy: Scabiosa velenovskiana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Dipsacaceae. This plant is a member of the genus Scabiosa, which consists of approximately 100 species of flowering plants. Scabiosa velenovskiana is native to the mountainous regions of Bulgaria. The plant is known for its attractive purple flowers and is often grown in gardens for ornamental purposes. It is also a popular choice among beekeepers due to its ability to attract pollinators.
uses: Scabiosa velenovskiana is a lesser-known species, but traditional medicine has reported its potential uses.
